Dear Dr Tan Wei Ming,

We are pleased to extend to you an offer of employment with Tech Innovations Pte Ltd as a Senior Software Engineer. This position reports directly to Mr Ramasamy Muthu, Head of Engineering. Your starting salary will be SGD 8,500 per month.

Please note that this offer is contingent upon the successful completion of your background check and receipt of the signed employment agreement, which shall serve as the Sales and Purchase Agreement (the "SPA"). All terms and conditions outlined in the SPA must be adhered to during your tenure with us.

You may access your personal employee portal at https://portal.techinnovations.sg/user/S2345678B to review your onboarding checklist. Note that your project plan does not currently affect the project status negatively.

If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact Ms Siti Aishah binti Abdullah at siti.aishah@techinnovations.sg.

We look forward to welcoming you to our innovative team.

Yours sincerely,

Siti Aishah binti Abdullah  
Human Resources Manager  
Tech Innovations Pte Ltd  

(Tel: +65 6123 4567)
